Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9EE2 "AXISASSASSIN-FE88-9EE2" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $fe88 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Axis Assassin.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The init routine at $FE88 is part of the original code, but was originally called before a lengthy depacking process. Taking the dump at $9EE2 and first calling this routine allows us to skip the depacking step and start the game more quickly.
